name: arabiyapath-mcp
title: ArabiyaPath
description: MCP server exposing the signed-in ArabiyaPath user's profile, course catalog, learning progress, purchases, and certificates. All tools run under the user's row-level security.
instructions: Tools for your ArabiyaPath account. Use `whoami` for profile details, `list_courses` to browse dialects/levels/units, `my_progress` for recently completed lessons, `my_purchases` for owned courses and memberships, and `my_certificates` for earned certificates. All tools act as the signed-in user; per-user data is protected by row-level security.

tools.name: whoami
tools.title: Who am I
tools.description: Return the signed-in ArabiyaPath user's profile: name, email, preferred dialect, and admin flag.

tools.name: list_courses
tools.title: List courses
tools.description: List ArabiyaPath dialects with their levels and units.

tools.name: my_progress
tools.title: My learning progress
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's recently completed ArabiyaPath lessons.

tools.name: my_purchases
tools.title: My purchases
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's ArabiyaPath purchases (courses, bundles, memberships).

tools.name: my_certificates
tools.title: My certificates
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's completion certificates with public verification URLs.
